description: IMO Law IDs — the 6 data flow laws enforced at every altitude. Violation of any IMO law is type IMO_VIOLATION (CRITICAL). Source: ARCHITECTURE.md Part V, PSB-CONST-001 Part III.

laws.description: Ingress performs schema validation only. No business logic, no routing decisions, no conditional branching based on data values.

laws.law: Ingress MUST NOT mutate business state
laws.description: Ingress may not write to STATE or SPINE tables. It validates and passes through. No side effects.
All decisions, all state mutations, all transformations, all business rules live exclusively in the Middle layer. Nothing else may own logic.
All tool calls, API invocations, and external service interactions are scoped to the Middle layer only. Ingress and Egress may not invoke tools.
Egress produces read-only views and exports only. No conditional logic, no transformations, no filtering based on business rules.
Egress may not write to any table. It reads and exports. No INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE operations.
